hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\(.*\)"/\1/'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/hooks/pre-commit-check.sh; elif echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git push'; then "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/hooks/pre-push-check.sh; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then echo "[hook] Edited: $FILE" >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.claude/dev-activity.log; fi
